allowed_claim: V4.0-R complete: production readiness preflight ready for review.

production_gaps.current_state: Dev/local capability token and scope guard exist; OAuth, SSO, enterprise identity federation, and production user lifecycle are not implemented.
production_gaps.required_production_state: Enterprise identity model with OAuth/SSO, user lifecycle, service accounts, actor binding, and audited authentication decisions.
production_gaps.evidence_source: V3.5 capability token guard, V3.6 scope guard, V4.0 BFF route tests.
production_gaps.recommended_next_phase: V4.0-S Auth and Tenant Control Plane Design

production_gaps.current_state: app_id/project_id/workspace_id scope isolation is tested for dev/local resources; production tenant_id, user_id, service_account_id, agent_id, and tenant admin lifecycle are not implemented.
production_gaps.required_production_state: Tenant control plane with tenant_id ownership, user/agent/service account isolation, tenant admin policy, and cross-tenant audit.
production_gaps.evidence_source: V4.0 scope isolation tests and V3.6 preflight hardening.
production_gaps.recommended_next_phase: V4.0-S Auth and Tenant Control Plane Design

production_gaps.current_state: Capability tokens support dev/local scope and origin checks; production issuance, expiration policy, rotation, revocation, downgrade, emergency revoke, and token audit are not implemented.
production_gaps.required_production_state: Managed token lifecycle with issuance, expiration, rotation, revocation, origin/audience/scope binding, emergency revoke, and audit trails.
production_gaps.evidence_source: V3.5 EventBridge token tests and SDK contract tests.

production_gaps.current_state: DTO, DOM, error, event, and audit redaction guards exist; production secret manager, secret rotation, and connector secret storage are not implemented.
production_gaps.required_production_state: Production secret manager with rotation, scoped access, connector secret handling, audit, and raw payload prevention.
production_gaps.evidence_source: V4.0 redaction tests and workflow-console no direct core call tests.

production_gaps.current_state: V4.0-M operation evidence is a dev/local BFF/UI baseline; production audit retention, export, legal hold, and tamper-evident storage are not implemented.
production_gaps.required_production_state: Retention policy, export controls, tamper-evident audit storage, legal hold, and compliance review workflows.
production_gaps.evidence_source: V4.0-M operation evidence and governance review tests.

production_gaps.current_state: Trace and evidence references exist for dev/local validation; production metrics, alerting, incident timeline, request_id coverage, SLO/SLA, and dashboards are not implemented.
production_gaps.required_production_state: Production observability with trace retention, metrics, alerting, incident timeline, request/correlation/idempotency coverage, and error taxonomy.
production_gaps.evidence_source: Gateway trace store, operation evidence correlation tests, and current audit report.

production_gaps.current_state: No production quota, rate limit, abuse detection, or customer-level throttling is implemented.
production_gaps.required_production_state: Per-tenant quota, rate limits, abuse detection, emergency throttling, and support escalation workflows.
production_gaps.evidence_source: Absence of quota route and production control plane.

production_gaps.current_state: Dev/local artifact and workflow storage exist; production data residency, customer export, deletion, retention, and offboarding are not implemented.
production_gaps.required_production_state: Tenant-aware data residency, export, deletion, retention policy, and offboarding runbooks.
production_gaps.evidence_source: V3.5/V3.6 storage and artifact lineage docs.

production_gaps.current_state: V3.5 SDK/BFF/Embed is a dev/local application adaptation baseline; production app registration, domain verification, onboarding, and support runbooks are not implemented.
production_gaps.required_production_state: Production external app onboarding with registration, domain verification, origin review, tenant provisioning, service account lifecycle, SDK/API policy, quota, abuse detection, offboarding, and support runbook.
production_gaps.evidence_source: V3.5 SDK/BFF/Embed docs and V4.0 audit report.

production_gaps.current_state: Dev/local recovery and idempotency guards exist in selected flows; production incident response, rollback, disaster recovery, and manual recovery runbooks are not implemented.
production_gaps.required_production_state: Incident response runbook, incident timeline, rollback descriptors, manual recovery, service ownership, and post-incident audit.
production_gaps.evidence_source: V4.0-Q rollback design gate and operation evidence baseline.
